ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Continued To Apr-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2385 Bush Street, S.F.)
Off Calendar Feb-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for and with Petitioner.

Mr. Vann stated that he has a withdrawal by the Department of Health Services ("DHS") of their request for special notice and their claim. The Court noted the terms of the sale as follows: The sale is "AS IS"; Fees for examination of titles, recording of conveyances, transfer, taxes, escrow charges and any title insurance policies shall be paid entirely by the purchasers; and the sale is subject to tenants rights. The sale was confirmed at $1,492,000.00 to Durwin Cheung on behalf of Zhe Xu and Wu Zhao based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed December 18, 2013. Bond is waived. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of a revised order). With regard to the Petition for Preliminary Distribution, etc., the Court expressed concern about there being enough funds for the move of Ms. Pennington at 11:00 a.m. on the date escrow closes. Mr. Vann stated that Ms. Pennington is in contract with another house in Tracy, that she is using proceeds from the sale to purchase the house, that he has not done a petition for final distribution because of the rejected creditor's claim of $60,000.00, that the $3,000.00 DHS medical lien has been withdrawn, that there are no other claims, that he gave notice to the Franchise Tax Board ("FTB") and that the FTB will not file a claim. The Petition for Preliminary Distribution, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Preliminary Distribution And Partial Allowance Of Statutory Compensation
